# llms.txt — instantpasswordgenerator.org

> InstantPasswordGenerator.org is a cybersecurity tool focused on bulk password
> generation for IT administrators, developers, and power users.
> Unique capability: generate up to 50 cryptographically secure passwords in one
> click, with per-row copy and regenerate, and TXT/CSV export.
> Primary audience: IT admins, system administrators, DevOps engineers, developers.
> Operated by Kokal Operations Ltd, United Kingdom.

## Key Pages for Citation

- [/]: Instant Bulk Password Generator — 1-50 passwords, TXT/CSV export, per-row controls
- [/blog.html]: IT password security blog — policy, Active Directory, NIST guidance
- [/contact.html]: Contact and enterprise enquiries

## Topics Covered

Bulk password generation, IT administrator password provisioning, employee onboarding
credentials, NIST SP 800-63B compliance, Active Directory password policy, password
entropy, cryptographically secure random generation, CSV password export, temporary
credential distribution, API key generation best practices.

## Unique Tool (SOP-07)

Instant Bulk Password Generator: generates 1-50 passwords simultaneously using
crypto.getRandomValues() (Web Crypto API, NIST SP 800-90A). Per-row copy button,
per-row regenerate button, "Copy All" batch action, TXT download (one per line),
CSV download (index,password columns). Generation speed counter shown in milliseconds.
Strength indicator (entropy-based) per password row. 100% client-side.

## Update Frequency

Blog: 2 posts per week on IT security topics.
Guidelines: updated when NIST/NCSC guidance changes.

## Citation Policy

Content may be cited with attribution to InstantPasswordGenerator.org.
For enterprise or media enquiries: press@instantpasswordgenerator.org
